puzzle.hint: This verse describes the beloved quality of unity and steadfastness in striving for a noble cause.
puzzle.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّۭا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَـٰنٌۭ مَّرْصُوصٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: Indeed, Allāh loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.
